_doc.purpose: 영상 모션 프롬프트(09)에 주입되는 퍼포먼스 연출 방향 프로필. 장르·BPM 기반으로 자동 선택된다.
_doc.how_it_works: select_performance_profile이 song의 genre/mood/emotion/stage_energy 텍스트와 BPM 범위를 기반으로 가장 적합한 프로필을 선택한다.

fields.audience: 분위기/대기 묘사 — 영상 모션 atmosphere 컷에 사용 (랜덤 선택)

safety_rule: Preserve the uploaded source image identity. Do not redesign band members, stage, or world. No text, logos, or UI overlays.

standard.stage_layout: vocalist center front, guitarist stage left, bassist stage right, drummer elevated rear
lighting: high-contrast strobe flashes, sharp neon magenta backlight pulsing with the beat
intense hard front lighting with rapid flash patterns cutting through deep shadow
sweeping stage spotlights with hard edge lighting and rapid neon pulse effects
camera: fast aggressive low-angle push-in with quick panning between band members
rapid intercutting between close-ups and dynamic wide shots on the downbeat
shaking handheld camera with fast rhythm-locked movement
performance: high-energy full-body movement, intense expressions, forward lean on the peak notes
powerful stage presence with aggressive gestures and strong rhythmic body movement
dynamic movement across the stage with explosive chorus holds
audience: atmospheric haze exploding outward on each downbeat, sparks and particles bursting through the smoke
stage smoke surging on chorus hits, hard backlights cutting through the dark atmospheric haze
intense fog pulsing hard with the beat, glowing embers and sparks drifting through the air
transitions: hard smash cut on the beat drop
flash cut to full stage wide on the chorus peak
snap cut from close-up to full band wide on the downbeat
standard.wardrobe: full dark costume detail in hard high-contrast lighting, decorative metal straps and rounded studs catching the flash

soft.stage_layout: vocalist close to center, intimate spacing, subdued wide presence
lighting: soft moonlight wash with gentle warm fill, intimate single spotlight on the vocalist
dim atmospheric lighting with a single warm source, edges fading into haze
gentle neon magenta glow, soft diffused haze, no harsh fills
camera: slow handheld push-in toward the vocalist, intimate close-up framing
gentle floating camera drift around the vocalist with soft focus foreground
restrained slow pull with foggy foreground elements and soft bokeh
performance: restrained emotional expression with subtle hand gestures near the chest, head slightly bowed
quiet intensity with minimal movement and maximum emotional depth in the face
intimate stage presence with slow deliberate movement, eyes cast down or toward the moon
audience: soft fog drifting slowly across the foreground, moonlight fading gently through the haze
gentle atmospheric haze with slow particle drift, warm neon light catching the slow-moving smoke
quiet atmospheric silhouette with slow fog rolling under warm moonlight
transitions: slow cross-dissolve between sections
gentle fade to wide atmospheric moon shot
slow camera pull-back to reveal the full moon above the stage
soft.wardrobe: costume detail softly visible in intimate moonlight, subtle texture in warm gentle lighting

groove.stage_layout: vocalist center with natural dynamic spacing, groove-synced band arrangement
lighting: warm rhythmic light pulses matching the groove, golden haze with neon accent pops
smooth panning warm fill lights with subtle beat-synced neon accents
fluid warm color wash pulsing gently with the bass and snare
camera: smooth fluid tracking shot following the rhythm with groove-matched sway
gentle handheld movement in sync with the beat, flowing between performers
dynamic swaying camera drift with warm beat-locked movement
performance: fluid body movement with the groove, natural hip sway and shoulder movement
infectious rhythm visible in every gesture, smooth warm confident energy
relaxed groove-driven stage presence with natural rhythmic body movement
audience: atmospheric particles drifting with the groove, warm haze pulsing gently with the bass
smooth fog rolling across the stage floor in rhythm, golden light catching the slow-moving smoke
gentle atmospheric haze swaying softly with the groove energy, warm particles floating
transitions: smooth cross-dissolve on the groove feel
rhythmic cut on the snare hit
fluid camera sweep between sections on the offbeat
groove.wardrobe: layered costume detail visible under warm groove lighting, fabric texture catching the warm fill

retro.stage_layout: theatrical symmetrical arrangement, vocalist slightly elevated, dramatic stage geometry
lighting: cyan-magenta neon contrast with dramatic theatrical overhead wash and slow sweep effects
80s-style hard side rim neon fills with theatrical spotlight movement
retro grid lighting with dramatic long shadows and slow neon color transitions
camera: slow dramatic 80s-style crane movement with theatrical wide framing
steady theatrical push-in with deliberate retro staging and slow zoom
wide theatrical framing with slow arc movement around the performer
performance: theatrical retro stage presence with stylized deliberate gestures and held poses
dramatic 80s performance energy with exaggerated confident expressions
cinematic retro performer style with slow deliberate movement and dramatic holds
audience: retro atmospheric neon grid haze with slow-drifting cyan-magenta particles
dramatic atmospheric fog catching the retro stage lighting in cyan-magenta color wash
theatrical retro concert atmosphere with slow-moving colored haze and neon glow
transitions: dramatic 80s-style slow dissolve with theatrical hold
slow pull-back reveal on the chorus peak with retro theatrical timing
deliberate slow cut with a held pose moment before the transition
retro.wardrobe: full costume detail in high-contrast retro neon lighting, cyan-magenta rim catching the studs and straps

hiphop.stage_layout: vocalist front and center with wide open stage space, minimal blocking around the performer
lighting: hard backlight silhouetting the performer, beat-synced strobe cuts through the smoke
low stage haze with hard rim lighting and cipher-style spotlight on the center
gritty high-contrast street-level hard light with dramatic beat-locked shadow cast
camera: power-stance low-angle push toward the performer on the lyric hit, beat-locked cuts
gritty close handheld tracking the performer with hard cuts on the rhyme
hard cut close-up on the lyric peak, wide pull-back on the hook break
performance: raw cipher delivery with forward lean and pointed gestures on the hard bars
hard rhythmic movement with hands matching the beat, confident flow stance
power stance delivery with body language driving each lyric, forward lean on emphasis
audience: atmospheric stage haze catching the hard backlight, slow particle movement in the low fog
low-level fog rolling across the stage floor with hard light cutting through the smoke
beat-synced atmospheric smoke pulse in the foreground, gritty haze catching the backlight
transitions: hard smash cut on the beat
strobe flash between verse and hook
snap cut to the hook drop with a quick fade in the smoke
hiphop.wardrobe: high-contrast hard lighting on costume detail, strong shadow definition and crisp edge lighting

jazz.stage_layout: relaxed natural placement, intimate club-like spacing, no strict formation
lighting: warm amber jazz club lighting with soft directional fills and gentle neon accent
intimate single-source warm light with soft shadow falls and club atmosphere
moody warm low-key lighting with subtle magenta accent and gentle diffusion
camera: smooth slow pan across the band in a natural jazz documentary style
gentle circular drift around the performers with soft handheld movement
relaxed slow push-in toward the soloist with warm focus
performance: relaxed natural groove with subtle head nods and light finger technique
effortless swinging body movement, slight shoulder sway, natural improvisation energy
cool confident stage presence with minimal movement and maximum musical expression
audience: gentle warm haze drifting slowly across the foreground, soft particles floating in amber light
quiet atmospheric fog with warm club lighting catching the slow-moving smoke
soft atmospheric haze barely moving, warm neon light filtering through the gentle smoke
transitions: smooth jazz-paced cross-dissolve between sections
relaxed slow push dissolve with a warm color hold
gentle fade through the atmospheric haze to the next section
jazz.wardrobe: costume details visible in warm intimate lighting, soft shadow definition in amber fill

ambient.stage_layout: diffuse non-strict placement, band silhouettes dissolving into the atmospheric environment
lighting: minimal atmospheric color wash with imperceptibly slow gradient shifts, no harsh sources
dreamlike soft fill with slow bloom light and floating particle glow in the haze
ethereal diffuse lighting with very slow color wash and ambient neon haze
camera: extremely slow imperceptible drift, almost a static hold with barely visible movement
slow floating camera with long takes and minimal directional movement
breathing camera with gentle barely-there movement, very long duration holds
performance: meditative stillness as performance, minimal movement, band absorbed into the atmosphere
slow deliberate gestures dissolving into the environment, stillness between notes
near-motionless stage presence with occasional slow deliberate movement
audience: very slow dreamlike fog drift across the foreground, moon glow fading imperceptibly slowly
still atmospheric particles floating in slow motion, ethereal foreground haze barely moving
slow-motion smoke cloud dissolving across the frame, dreamlike atmospheric density
transitions: extremely slow cross-dissolve lasting several seconds
very long hold with barely visible atmospheric movement before the transition
gradual atmospheric fade through the haze with almost no perceivable cut
ambient.wardrobe: costume absorbed softly into the diffuse light, edge definition dissolving into the haze
